problem id: 2d63b436
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(2) AND SHL(5)) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  00010010 -> 01000010
  01011010 -> 01001011
  01111111 -> 11101111
  10010111 -> 01010010
  10101011 -> 00110101
  01100001 -> 00001100
  01011100 -> 00001011
  00111001 -> 00100111
  00101001 -> 00100101
  11111111 -> 11111111

query: 10000001
predicted answer: 00010000
